mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM user_role ur JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, username, phone, status, login_failures, locked_until, created_at, updated_at FROM user ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, phone, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET login_failures = login_failures + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET login_failures = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET login_failures = 0, locked_until = #{lockedUntil} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET login_failures = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
